feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: How to create the delivery challan and t- code& full explain
SOAP Sales order API - data type enhancetype
entry.content:
Hi Team,

we are trying to extend AXA sales order API with table type using data type enhancement to pass header textes, we have added table type but problem is it not available in any of enhancements of sales order.

Sales order(AXA) - SalesOrderBulkRequest_In

Please find the screenshot of data type enhacement. can you please suggest how can we save textes for data type enhancment?

Thanks

entry.title: Upgrade SAP S/4HANA from 2021 to 2023 FPS02: Wrong Fiori Version
entry.content:
Good Morning,

I have recently upgraded a S/4HANA system from 2021 to 2023 FPS02.

After the Upgrade, I noticed the following:
SAP FIORI FES FOR S/4HANA 2023 SP01 was chosen in the stack by the MP, instead of SP02
I had to update UIBAS001 758 from SP01 to SP02 by using K-75802INUIBAS001.SAR.

What is all the more surprising is that Note 3340880 describes that FIORI FES FOR S/4HANA is comprised of SAP_UI 758 and UI for Basis Applications 758.

SAP recommends that SPS should be implement to warranty Stack integrity.
But, the Maintenance Planner has taken SP2 for SAP_UI and SP1 for INUIBAS.

Would you know why the maintenance planner has chosen SP01 instead of SP02 for UI for the target Basis Applications 758?

Regards,

entry.title: IDoc Posting test error- HRMD_A01
entry.content: While testing the IDoc inbound processing for HRMD_A01 using WE19, we see the error message "Object is locked Plan ver. , obj ty. , obj ID" no other transactions or sessions were open during the testing, need help identifying why this error is occurring.

entry.title: Data Migration Cockpit Error : instance already exists in the table
entry.content:
How can the Data Migration Cockpit be configured or utilized to perform a mass upload of material master data for multiple company codes and valuation types in a single file? Currently, attempting to combine records for multiple company codes and valuation types in one upload file leads to staging table errors indicating duplicate key fields, even when no duplicates exist within the file. Is there a way to simplify this process and avoid the need to create separate files for each combination of company code and valuation type?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: 3PR Remittance Evaluation program PC00_M99_URME Reporting details by employees with too many rows
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

We converted to S4 recently and started using the program PC00_M99_URME for Third-party remittance evaluation run.

We have concerns with this program’s reporting. It is populating nearly 20k rows for one pay period wherein the PC00_M99_URMU program used to get less than 100 rows in the report output. We see that URME report is generating the data by employee, output shows the data by employee. But we want the data by the Supplier and Business area only like we had in URMU.

Your help would be appreciated to bring the format like URMU. We don't need the URME report by employee. We only need it by Supplier and Business area.

URME:

URMU:

We need only one row for Supplier and Bus.A combination. But it is populating it by employee, so we see more rows.

For example, 812 Supplier and 1001 Bus.A should display the total amount in one row and 812 Supplier and 1002 Bus.A in one row like in URMU report below. Same for 810 and 1001, 1002 combination.

Thank you.

entry.title: [Q] How to change the hostname used for Fiori Launchpad ? (/n/ui2/flp)
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

after doing a system copy of an S/4 Hana system, when starting the Fiori Launchpad using transaction /n/ui2/flp, it is opening the URL with the hostname of the old system. How do we change it to the new hostname ?

I only found a suggestion to edit table httpurlloc, but there is no hostname there and we are not using web dispatcher on this system.

Many thanks for letting me know quickly!

entry.title: Support SAP Chart Designer for SAP GUI 8.0 & S/4H 2023
entry.content:
Hy Community,

is the SAP Chart Designer still supported for SAP GUI 8.0 & S/4H 2023 ?

 

regardsDietmar

entry.title: FSCM Credit Management integration with Duns & Bradstreet
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

Greetings! 

I have been looking for documentation for connecting SAP S/4HANA with Duns & Bradstreet for updating the credit score in the the business partner. We are currently running basic credit management and hence cannot use "Cloud for Credit Integration".

Could someone help and provide details on how the integration with D&B can be managed and kindly share any technical documentation around the same. I understand that there are various blogs for the same but have been confusing me and I am not able to understand which is the best way to do this integration.

entry.title: General ledger distribution and assessment
entry.content:
Hi,

As I have different allocation portions between Local and group GAAP, I need to make distribution and assessment to general ledger level. I found a solution with transactions FAGLGA11 & FAGLGA31 but I read that those transactions are going to be deprecated in the SAP S/4HANA latest versions. Does anyone know how can I do it with new transactions? I have tried with KSV1 & KSU1 but I can not choose the ledger so they are not useful for me. 

Regards,
Ale.

entry.title: Pseudo delta CDS-->SAC
entry.content:
Hello,

I have a question regarding applying pseudo delta from s/4 hana to SAC. I prepared delta query based on full query in CDS- filtered the data for 3 days back, based on timestamp. Data is from ACDOCA. Is there any possibility to implement delta query to SAC? I'm not sure if any of the import methods in SAC will work. I'm also using New Model, so there is no 'Incremental Data Load'.

entry.title: Material Part number enhancement
entry.content:
Hi Team

Could you let us know the feasibility of adding MATERIAL PART NUMBER field/column to SUPPLIER INVOICE LIST app and in the Backend transaction MIRO?

In the Supplier Invoices List App, under the Purchase Document Reference tab, the requirement is to add a new column for the Manufacturer Part Number next to the Material Number (MATNR). This column should display the MFRPN (Manufacturer Part Number) corresponding to each Material Number. The Part Number fetched from MARA table, where the MATNR is matched with the appropriate MFRPN field. 

Thanks & Regards

entry.title: Eclipse ADT doesn't show the Active ATC results with S/4 HANA 2023 SP02
entry.content:
Hi All,

I couldn't find any blog or questions answered for this issue. So had to ask it myself.

One of our clients have the latest S/4 HANA 2023 SP02 machine, and we run ATC with the variant S4HANA_READINESS_2023_NO_FLE in the same system (no remote). The run is fine and show as active in the results in ATC transaction. However, it doesn't show up in the eclipse ADT (Also updated to the latest versions). All the relevant authorizations are given for the users.

The 'Older' results showing are the ATC run on specific objects only, but not the overall run that we do in scheduled BG job.

Another similar question was https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/can-t-show-up-atc-central-check-result-browser-in-adt/qaq-p/12275606, but it was specific to remote ATC on older release.

Why does it not work on the most recent release as well? Any ideas please?

entry.title: Unable to get the Insert/Del option in document assignment tab in CS02 after upgrade S/4 HANA 2023
entry.content:
Hi,

In SAP S/4 HANA 1909, we got the INSERT/DEL option automatically for attaching the document in cs02

 

After the upgrade of SAP S/4 HANA 2023 version, we are unable to get INSERT/DEL option default for attaching the documents in document assignment tab in CS02 (BOM change). 

Path:: CS02>>header>document assignment tab

Could anyone suggest why the system is behaving differently after upgrade?

entry.title: BUS1029 Chart of Account (Event Missing)
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

why has Object BUS1029 Chart of Account no events? 
If I try to generate a new object from that. It is not possible to generate that new object.

kind regards
Gunter

entry.title: FINT: DZ documents not picked for Interest calculation.
entry.content: In the transaction Code: FINT, the DZ documents against RV document are not picked the Interest calculation. Due to this various overdue interest is pending to post.

entry.title: FLP: How to Disable 'Search' in the Shell Bar for Specific Applications/Catalogs Only
entry.content:
Hi,

We are looking for a way to disable the search functionality in the shell bar of the Fiori Launchpad, but only for specific applications or catalogs.

So far we've managed to disable search globally via transaction /UI2/FLP_CUS_CONF by specifying SEARCH option as false

I also tried to disable it in a catalog via target mapping for application by using parameter "renderers/fiori2/componentData/config/enableSearch" as false, but this one did not work at all.

I was only able to disable it by creating a separate target mapping and specifying semantic object as Shell and action as bootConfig and adding the parameter that I had used before, but this worked on a global level again.

Our current SAP_UI version is 758.

 Is there a way to disable the search functionality in the FLP shell bar specifically for selected applications or catalogs, rather than globally?

Thanks in advance for your help!

entry.title: Order BOM with different plant code in Sales order
entry.content:
Hi,

The shipping plant for the order is A.
The production plant is B.
I want to generate a Order BOM at plant B because there is a production BOM at plant B, which actually produces the order BOM for the orders registered at A.
The assumption is Strategy “50” both plant.

 

Best regards,

Ryoichi

entry.title: How to find data source, extractor, CDS views for time info object
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I like to know how do I find the data sources, extractors and CDS views which has any time characteristics. In other words I like to know that my time related info objects such as 0calmonth or 0calweek or 0fiscper info objects how do I know in which data sources, extractors and CDS views are using these info objects.

If I go to "where used-list" I dont see this information but only ADSO, Queries transformations etc.

I know there is a table name RSOSFIELDMAP which we can use in classic BW, t-code SE 11 to see the mapping from data sources for an object but this t-code is not working for me in BW 4/HANA.

Do I have to use Eclipse or HANA studio or can I use RSA1 in BW 4/HANA environment.

Thanks and much appreciated.

Regards

entry.title: Service procurement in sap S4/HANA
entry.content:
Hi all, 

Can anyone explain for me What is the Difference Between External Service Management and Lean Service Procurement, and How Do You Decide Which One to Use?

Thanks in advance.
